def negative_public_function_return_type_annotated_as_union_of_many_unrelated_types():
    rule_id = "public_function_return_type_annotated_as_union_of_many_unrelated_types"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Public function return annotation is Union of four or more unrelated types, indicating mixed concerns."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
